title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
